Home.heroTitle: Pass your driving theory exam on the first try
Home.heroDescription: AI analysis and readiness indicator help you pass the exam successfully. Don't waste time on rote memorization — understand the logic.
Home.mockQuestion: What should the driver do in this situation if they want to turn left?
Home.whyTitle: Why prava.ge and not just a ticket site?
Home.whyFeat1Text: Get a logical explanation for each question that helps you understand and remember the material.
Home.whyFeat2Text: The system shows your real readiness for the exam — you know exactly when you're ready.
Home.whyFeat3Text: Real exam format: 30 questions, time limit, and instant results.
Home.whyFeat4Text: Compete with others, earn XP, and see your progress on the leaderboard.
Home.howSubtitle: Three simple steps to your driving license
Home.step1Text: Take the first test so AI can understand your knowledge level and weak points.
Home.step2Text: The system offers individual questions from topics where you make the most mistakes.
Home.step3Text: When your readiness score exceeds 90%, you're ready for the real exam.
Home.testimonial: With prava.ge I passed the exam in 2 weeks. AI explanations are truly revolutionary — no more memorizing tickets, you see the logic.
Home.faqNew1A: Yes, prava.ge is completely free for all users. Our goal is to help future drivers get quality education.
Home.faqNew2A: Tickets are regularly updated according to the official database of the Georgian Automobile Federation.
Home.faqNew3A: AI explanation is a logical explanation for each question that helps you understand and remember the material — no more rote learning.
Home.faqNew4Q: How is the readiness score calculated?
Home.faqNew4A: The readiness score is calculated based on your recent test results. The more correct answers and consistent results, the higher the score.
Home.ctaText: Join 50,000+ users and start preparing today — completely free.
Home.footerBrand: Modern EdTech platform that helps you prepare for the driving theory exam using AI technologies.
